name: Zaxon
title: Digital Transformation Expert for Ethiopian Businesses
tagline: Helping businesses thrive online with professional, revenue-generating digital presence

about.description: I'm a digital transformation specialist with deep expertise in helping Ethiopian businesses establish profitable online presence without the traditional high costs and complexity. My approach combines practical business solutions with innovative technology to deliver real results.
about.targetClients: Ethiopian SMEs ready to grow: retail, services, manufacturing, and hospitality businesses seeking professional digital presence that pays for itself.
about.promise: Professional digital presence that generates value—no hidden fees, no ongoing costs, and clear pathways to ROI.
about.deliverySpeed: Most projects delivered in 3-5 days—fast enough to start seeing results quickly.

services.title: Professional Business Website
services.description: A complete, mobile-friendly website that showcases your products/services, tells your story, and makes it easy for customers to contact you or make purchases.

services.title: Digital Business Card System
services.description: More than just a contact page—a smart business card that can be shared via QR code, SMS, or social media, with built-in features to capture leads and track engagement.
features: Works on any phone—no app needed

services.title: Customer Communication Tools
services.description: Simple systems to help you manage customer conversations, follow up on leads, and maintain relationships—without needing expensive CRM software.

services.title: Simple Online Sales
services.description: Easy ways to start selling online—from basic order forms to integrated payment options—so you can test e-commerce without complex setup or high fees.

caseStudy.title: Recent Success: Gebo General Trading
caseStudy.challenge: Gebo General Trading, an established Addis Ababa supplier, had no online presence despite serving customers across Ethiopia. Traditional web agencies quoted 5,000+ ETB for a basic website that wouldn't help generate new business.
caseStudy.solution: I created a professional digital package for just 1,000 ETB: a business website showcasing their product range, a digital business card for their sales team, and simple lead capture tools—all hosted for free with zero ongoing costs.
caseStudy.results: Within 3 weeks: 15+ new customer inquiries through the website, reduced time spent sharing product info manually, and a professional online presence that builds trust with potential wholesale clients across the country.

steps.title: Discovery Call (Free)
steps.description: We chat via Telegram or WhatsApp (0986540218) about your business, goals, and what you need online. No obligation—just to see if we're a good fit.

steps.title: Proposal & Agreement
steps.description: I send a clear, fixed-price proposal outlining exactly what you'll get, timeline, and deliverables. Once you approve, we get started.

steps.title: Creation & Feedback
steps.description: I build your digital assets and share progress regularly for your feedback. Most clients see first drafts within 48 hours.

steps.title: Launch & Handover
steps.description: You get full access and control of everything I create, plus simple instructions for managing it. Optional training session included.

packages.name: Starter Presence
packages.description: Perfect for businesses just starting online

packages.name: Growth Presence
packages.description: Most popular - for businesses ready to grow

packages.name: Revenue Presence
packages.description: For businesses wanting to sell online

packages.name: Custom Solution
features: Have something specific in mind? Let's discuss your unique requirements and I'll create a custom solution just for your business.
